title: cordia triangularis
intro: Cordia triangularis, also known as the Wild Coffee or Spanish Sage, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cordia triangularis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the relief of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Cordia triangularis include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
